reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All three gates passed. Gate 1: Function validateDataColumn has production caller at subscriber.go:316. Gate 2: Entry point is untrusted P2P network (p2p_peers). Gate 3: TOCTOU race in PeerDAS data column deduplication is Fusaka-specific and in scope. An attacker can trigger this via P2P gossip by broadcasting identical data column sidecars to multiple peers simultaneously, causing concurrent validation before cache marking, resulting in duplicate acceptance that violates the deduplication invariant.
